purpose: Activity Log entry — Dr Tim ENG visit 2026-05-13: closed for lab, July 15 opening, June 15 followup target

text.content: Dr Tim ENG visit — LocalMD Sunset Park 6219 5th Ave Brooklyn
Practice still being built out. Credentialing through CAIPA, completion expected July. Opens July 15. Closed for lab — exchanged contacts. Aaron offered to help with office setup as needed.

Followup ~June 15 (1 month before opening). Offer office setup support. Track CAIPA credentialing progress. Tied to broader LocalMD Sunset Park push (Dr Alex CDTM unlock + Dr Rybstein green-light still open).
